title: AI chips, compute sovereignty, and geopolitics signal
why_it_matters: Compute supply chains, chips, energy, export controls, and sovereign AI infrastructure shape what AI systems, startups, and national innovation strategies can actually deploy.
actionable_opportunity: Create Ω-SovereignCompute-T as a tracker for Canada/Québec compute, chips, energy availability, quantum, patents, export controls, and procurement signals.

oak_check.risk: Geopolitical and chip-market narratives can mix hard facts with political framing or speculative deal reporting.
oak_check.limit: Treat as a strategic tracking direction, not as a confirmed market forecast.
oak_check.falsification_route: Verify primary sources for chip deals, export controls, energy constraints, procurement, and patent activity before promotion.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Separate political narrative from hard indicators: fabs, patents, export controls, procurement, power, and deployment capacity.

sources.title: Source verification required: compute sovereignty and geopolitics item mentioned in chat briefing

next_action: Create a source-backed compute-sovereignty tracker only after verifying the deal and policy sources.
business_funding_signal: Could identify Canada/Québec opportunities around compute infrastructure, energy, grants, procurement, and chip-adjacent innovation.
